div1.entryFree:
Attest, vb. 1) to certify, testify: a contract of eternal love, --ed by the holy close of lips, Tw. V, 161. a crooked figure may a. in little place a million, Tw. V, 161 (i. e. may serve as a certificate for a million). now a. that those whom you called fathers did beget you, H5 III, 1, 22 (i. e. certify it by your deeds).
2) to call to witness: I a. the Gods, Troil. II, 2, 132.
